metadata.publisher: Uganda Printing and Publishing Corporation (UPPC), Entebbe
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Uganda
metadata.source_note: Excise Duty (Amendment) Act, 2024 from the Parliament of Uganda CMIS repository (embedded text layer; single-block capture of the operative pages). Substitutes Schedule 2 rows including item 8: motor spirit (gasoline) Shs 1550 per litre and gas oil Shs 1230 per litre - the rates UGAMOD UG_2025 applies. In force 1 July 2024 (FY2024/25); the FY2025/26 amendment print is not yet located (open vintage question, rulespec-ug#1).
metadata.title: Excise Duty (Amendment) Act, 2024 — Schedule 2 rows substituted (fuel and others)
